title: 3D bundles+
description: 3D Bundles+ adds a clean, vanilla-style 3D bundle model.
body:
## 🎒 3D Bundles+ Resource Pack

Replace the flat Minecraft bundle with a **fully modeled 3D bundle** that looks clean, realistic, and perfectly vanilla. **3D Bundles+** upgrades your inventory visuals without changing gameplay or affecting performance.

✨ **Why download this pack?**
- ✔ **Fully 3D bundle model** (no flat item)
- ✔ Clean, smooth textures with accurate geometry
- ✔ **Vanilla-friendly style** — blends naturally in-game
- ✔ Works in **Survival, PvP, and RPG worlds**
- ✔ **Lightweight & performance-friendly**
- ✔ Visual upgrade only — **no gameplay changes**

🎒 Perfect for players who want a **more immersive and satisfying inventory experience** while keeping Minecraft’s original feel.

---

⌚ **Download GOAL** : 1000 - please help

---

## 📥 Installation Guide

1. Download the **3D Bundles+ Resource Pack (.zip)**
2. Open Minecraft → **Options → Resource Packs → Open Pack Folder**
3. Move the `.zip` file into the **resourcepacks** folder
4. Go back to Minecraft and **enable the pack**
5. Click **Done** and enjoy your new 3D bundles!

---

## 🧩 Supported Versions
- **Minecraft 26.1**
- **Minecraft 1.21.11**
- **Minecraft 1.21.6 – 1.21.10**

---

## 🧾 Credits
- **Made by Pushkraj**
- ❌ You are **NOT allowed** to copy or reuse these assets in other packs

---

💾 **Download now and upgrade your inventory visuals**
